stemHtml: What affect does ice accretion on the wings have on the CL (Lift Coefficient) and the critical angle of attack?

options.a: CL increases and the critical AoA increases.
options.b: CL decreases and the critical AoA increases.
options.c: CL decreases and the critical AoA decreases.
options.d: CL increases and the critical AoA decreases.
